pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Utagawa Hiroshige "The 53 stations of the Tokaido-Nihonbashi" 100％ and 400% Set
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are excited to present the Be@rbrick Utagawa Hiroshige 'The 53 stations of the Tokaido-Nihonbashi' 100% and 400% Collectible Set!  These figures stand at approximately 11.02' and 2.75' tall and feature art by renowned Japanese ukiyo-e artist Utagawa Hiroshige from his series 'The 53 stations of the Tokaido-Nihonbashi'.  Be sure to add this collectible figure to your collection today!
